mapper.select: SELECT channel.accountType, COALESCE(balanceSummary.balance, 0) AS balance FROM ( SELECT #{wechatType} AS accountType UNION ALL SELECT #{alipayType} AS accountType UNION ALL SELECT #{bankType} AS accountType ) channel LEFT JOIN ( SELECT delta.accountType, COALESCE(SUM(delta.deltaAmount), 0) AS balance FROM ( SELECT a.account_type AS accountType, CASE WHEN t.transaction_type = #{incomeType} THEN t.amount WHEN t.transaction_type = #{expenseType} THEN -t.amount WHEN t.transaction_type = #{transferType} THEN -t.amount ELSE 0 END AS deltaAmount FROM finance_transaction t JOIN finance_account a ON a.id = t.account_id AND a.deleted = 0 WHERE t.deleted = 0 AND t.company_id = #{companyId} AND t.status = #{successStatus} AND t.transaction_period <= #{period} AND t.account_id IS NOT NULL AND a.account_type IN (#{wechatType}, #{alipayType}, #{bankType}) UNION ALL SELECT a.account_type AS accountType, -t.amount AS deltaAmount FROM finance_transaction t JOIN finance_account a ON a.id = t.opposite_account_id AND a.deleted = 0 WHERE t.deleted = 0 AND t.company_id = #{companyId} AND t.status = #{successStatus} AND t.transaction_period <= #{period} AND t.transaction_type = #{transferType} AND t.opposite_account_id IS NOT NULL AND a.account_type IN (#{wechatType}, #{alipayType}, #{bankType}) ) delta GROUP BY delta.accountType ) balanceSummary ON balanceSummary.accountType = channel.accountType ORDER BY FIELD(channel.accountType, #{wechatType}, #{alipayType}, #{bankType})
